events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes misreading mark colors for utility locates (red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm). This is a pure identification item - the worker is misreading the standard color codes. This is non-compliant with 811/CGA best practices. At rough-complete stage, misreading locate marks is a serious safety issue that could lead to striking utilities.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (misreading utility marks could lead to striking a utility line)
Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective
Percent complete: ~70 (rough-complete)
Confidence: high
